archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) + Dark Mode (Midnight Black & Orange/Amber Accent)

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use large padding (p-12, p-16) for sections. Elements within borders must have at least p-6 or p-8.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A: Tetris Grid) for features and how-it-works. Base grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with gap-8 to gap-12.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-aligned for textual content, asymmetrical balances.

surfaces_and_effects.navigation: Glassmorphism (Crystal Glass) - backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with a 1px delicate bottom border (border-white/10). Sticky positioned.
surfaces_and_effects.cards: Flat solid background (#0C0C0C) with 1px border-white/10. On hover, slight lift and border color shifts to highlight (rgba(255, 95, 21, 0.4)).
surfaces_and_effects.borders: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look) for the features section, exposing the skeleton.
surfaces_and_effects.hero_overlay: bg-black/40 over the background image to ensure text legibility.

components_strategy.hero: Bold typography, abstract orange digital background image behind a black/40 overlay. Contains main headline, descriptive subtext, and a high-contrast primary CTA button.
components_strategy.how_it_works: Vertical timeline or 4-column minimal bento-box flow with JetBrains Mono numbers (01, 02) indicating steps.
components_strategy.features_grid: Bento-grid overlapping elements. Emphasize one large feature (AI Blueprint) and several smaller ones.
components_strategy.pricing: 3-tier card layout. The 'Pro' tier should use the 'Tracing Beam' effect or a glowing orange border to stand out.
components_strategy.footer: Massive typography (text-[10vw]) for the word 'PLUGIINS' or 'LET\'S BUILD'. Dark base.
components_strategy.cta: Solid brand color button (#FF5F15) with text-white, no rounded corners (rounded-none) or very sharp (rounded-sm) to keep the brutalist/technical look.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Buttons and links must explicitly set hover text/bg color (e.g., hover:bg-[#FF7A3D]).
motion_and_interactions.cards: Subtle -translate-y-1 on hover for interactive bento boxes.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Fade up (opacity and slight Y translation) staggered on scroll.

icons.style: duotone or thin weights to match the sophisticated tech aesthetic.

image_urls.description: Orange digital lines converging, great for AI/tech concept
Dark red/orange abstract geometric curves for feature sections
Dark architectural corridor for the 'scalable/secure' feature visual

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: All interactive elements, buttons, links, and forms MUST include a role-based 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'hero-cta-button', 'pricing-pro-plan-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast for all text over backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install necessary icon libraries: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react
Ensure 'Outfit', 'Manrope', and 'JetBrains Mono' are imported via Google Fonts in index.html or globals.css.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for structural bento-grid layouts. Do not use generic Shadcn Card components for the hero or primary feature grids.
Apply the styling rules exactly as mapped in this JSON.
For the sponsor logos, render them as greyscale and use mix-blend-screen or opacity adjustments so they look cohesive in the dark theme.
Use framer-motion for simple staggered entrance animations and hover effects on grid items.
